prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: hero poster. Story world: Ward 1908. Premise: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.. Setting: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. Threat presence: The Record Keeper. Recurring motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.. Subgenre: haunted institution. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Immediate scene brief: Ward 1908 Story Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Ward 1908 (ward-1908) | Hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. | Subgenre: haunted institution | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing | Villain: The Record Keeper | Villain worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention. | Motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes.
